David, let us wrap up. Can you recap the action items from the sync?
Sure. Priya said the dashboard was ready, so onboarding can start this week.
Good. And you told the team you would send the technical notes, right?

Exactly. The deck is due on Friday. What is still outstanding?
The billing question. Let us circle back to it on Monday.

Hi Patricia, this is David, leaving you a quick voice note after our Customer Success sync, just to recap the action items so nothing falls through. On the call, Priya said the new dashboard was finally ready, so we can start the client's onboarding this week. I told the team I would send the technical notes by Wednesday, and you said you would finish the onboarding deck by Friday. That deck is the main task right now, and you are the owner, so I will not touch it. Priya told us she would book the training session once the deck is approved, and we assigned the follow-up email to the support team. One thing is still outstanding: the billing question from last week is not done yet, so let us circle back to it on Monday. Could you share the minutes with the client today and ask everyone to confirm their tasks? Thanks, and talk soon.

Hi Patricia, this is Priya, just following up after the sync with a short note from my side. I wanted to confirm the action items I own, so we stay aligned. In the meeting, I said the dashboard was ready, and that is still true; the client logged in this morning and really liked it. I also told the team I would book the training session, but I have one question. You said the onboarding deck would be due on Friday, so should I wait for the final deck before I send the training invite, or can I book a provisional date now? I do not want the training to become an outstanding item next week. The other thing is the health score report. I said it was almost ready, and I will send it to you by Thursday, before the renewal call. Let us circle back tomorrow if anything changes. Thanks for keeping the minutes so clear; it really helps me track my tasks.
